name: aurora-tool-calls
title: Aurora Tool Calls
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Condensed, grouped tool call display for AI sessions. Supports running shimmer, completed, and error states with collapsible arg/result panels.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora Tool Calls.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-badge`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-empty-state`, `aurora-input`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/tool-calls.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-badge`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-empty-state`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-components`.
